name: Usage of Web Request Commands
description: Detects the usage of various web request commands with CommandLine tools and Windows PowerShell cmdlets (including aliases).

prompts.prompt: A PowerShell script containing web request commands was executed. This could indicate data retrieval, command and control activity, or malicious file download. Event Details: **Timestamp** {timestamp}, **Process GUID** {process_guid}, **Process Name** {process_name}, **User** {user}, **Script Block Text** {ScriptBlockText}. Investigate this activity to determine if it's legitimate network communication or suspicious web-based interaction.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp when the PowerShell script block was executed.

parameters.name: process_guid
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the process that executed the PowerShell.

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that executed the PowerShell script (e.g., 'powershell.exe').

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the PowerShell command was executed.

parameters.name: ScriptBlockText
parameters.description: The full text of the PowerShell script block containing the web request commands.
